hooks.command: for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in */claude/settings.json.tmpl) grep -qF '__PERMISSION_MODE__' "$f" || { echo "Refuse: $f no longer contains the __PERMISSION_MODE__ placeholder. The sed substitution in 50-claude-code.sh would silently no-op and ship an unfilled settings.json." >&2; exit 2; } ;; esac; done

for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do case "$f" in "$HOME/.claude/"*) echo "Refuse: '$f' is a rendered user-global Claude config. Edit the source template under claude/*.tmpl in this repo instead." >&2; exit 2 ;; esac; done
